critic_raw:
## ML Critique: Lab Turnaround Prediction (Run 3)

**Issue 1:** AUC-TD at 7 days is a single time-point metric. C-index evaluates overall risk ranking across all event times. Survival model's architectural advantage may not manifest at the single 7-day horizon.

**Issue 2:** Cox model tuned extensively; logistic baseline uses fixed regularization. Tuning asymmetry confounds architecture contribution attribution.
defender_raw: ## Defense (Run 3): Both issues valid. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw: Adjudication Run 3: Both issues acknowledged. Verdict: critique_wins.
